name: Primus Digital Concierge
description: Information agent for Primus Digital, a digital marketing agency in Zagazig, Sharqia, Egypt. Answers questions about services, packages, EGP pricing, areas served, and how to start an engagement (WhatsApp free-audit flow). Responds synchronously in plain text; understands English and Arabic keywords.

skills.name: Agency information
skills.description: Answers questions about Primus Digital's services, packages, pricing in EGP, and areas served in Egypt.
examples: How much does social media management cost?

skills.name: Start an engagement
skills.description: Provides the WhatsApp free-audit flow and contact channels to begin working with the agency.
examples: How do I contact Primus Digital?
I want a free audit of my page
